ai_opening: You have five minutes to convince us. We've seen hundreds of pitches this month. What makes your company different? And more importantly, why should we invest now?
learning_goal: Practice persuasive pitching and responding to tough investor questions
rescue_hint: You could say: Our company solves... The market opportunity is...

title: Discussing Immigration Policy
emotional_stakes: You're in a political science seminar discussing a controversial policy.
ai_opening: This week's topic is immigration policy reform. There are arguments for more open borders and arguments for stricter controls. I'd like each of you to present a nuanced position. What's yours?
learning_goal: Practice presenting balanced political arguments respectfully
rescue_hint: You could say: This is a complex issue. On the one hand... Yet we must also consider...

title: Museum Tour Guide
emotional_stakes: You're on a museum tour and the guide is asking visitors to participate.
ai_opening: We're now in the Ancient Egypt section. This statue is over 3,000 years old! What do you find most fascinating about ancient civilizations? Anyone want to share their thoughts?
learning_goal: Practice asking questions and expressing interest about historical topics
rescue_hint: You could say: I find it amazing that... Can you tell us more about...?

title: Babysitting Instructions
emotional_stakes: You're babysitting your neighbor's kids and the parents are leaving instructions.
ai_opening: Thank you so much for doing this! Okay, so bedtime is at 8 PM. They've already eaten dinner. If Emma gets scared, she likes her teddy bear. Any questions before we go?
learning_goal: Practice understanding instructions and asking clarifying questions
rescue_hint: You could ask: What should I do if...? Is there anything they can't eat?

title: Fitness Class
emotional_stakes: You're joining a group fitness class for the first time.
ai_opening: Welcome to Zumba class! Is this your first time? Don't worry, just follow along and have fun. We'll start with some warm-up exercises. Ready?
learning_goal: Practice understanding physical instructions and body vocabulary
rescue_hint: You could say: Can you show me again? Which arm do I...?

title: Opening a Small Business
emotional_stakes: You're meeting with a business advisor about starting your own bakery.
ai_opening: So you want to open a bakery! That's exciting. Let's talk about your business plan. Have you thought about your target market, location, and initial investment?
learning_goal: Practice discussing business concepts and asking strategic questions
rescue_hint: You could say: I've been thinking about... My plan is to...

title: Talking About Dreams
emotional_stakes: Late-night conversation with friends about your dreams and aspirations.
ai_opening: If you could do anything in the world - no limits, no worries about money - what would you do? What's your biggest dream?
learning_goal: Practice using conditionals and talking about future aspirations
rescue_hint: You could say: If I could... I would... My dream is to...

title: Emergency Room Visit
emotional_stakes: You slipped and hurt your ankle badly. You're at the ER in pain.
ai_opening: I can see you're in pain. I'm Dr. Patel. Can you tell me exactly what happened and where it hurts? On a scale of 1 to 10, how bad is the pain?
learning_goal: Practice describing injuries in detail and understanding medical procedures
rescue_hint: You could say: I fell and landed on my... The pain is about a...

title: Podcast Interview
emotional_stakes: You've been invited as a guest on a popular podcast about your expertise.
ai_opening: Welcome to the show! Our listeners are really excited to hear from you. Let's start simple - tell us your story. How did you end up doing what you do?
learning_goal: Practice extended narration and engaging storytelling
rescue_hint: You could say: Well, it all started when... The turning point was...

title: Cooking Class Abroad
emotional_stakes: You're taking a cooking class while traveling to learn local cuisine.
ai_opening: Welcome to our Thai cooking class! Today we'll make pad thai and green curry. First, let's talk about the ingredients. Have you ever cooked Thai food before?
learning_goal: Practice following complex instructions and talking about food preparation
rescue_hint: You could say: I've never tried... What does this ingredient do?

title: Online Meeting Etiquette
emotional_stakes: You're joining a video conference with international colleagues for the first time.
ai_opening: Hi everyone! Let me introduce our new team member who's joining us from the overseas office. Would you like to say a few words about yourself and your role?
learning_goal: Practice professional self-introduction and meeting participation
rescue_hint: You could say: Thank you for the introduction. I'm... and I'll be working on...

title: Climate Change Debate
emotional_stakes: A heated classroom debate about whose responsibility it is to fix climate change.
ai_opening: Last week we said individuals should change their habits. But is that fair when just 100 companies are responsible for 71% of global emissions? Should the burden really be on ordinary people?
learning_goal: Practice counter-arguments and supporting claims with data
rescue_hint: You could say: While it's true that... we can't ignore the fact that...

title: Teaching Someone Your Language
emotional_stakes: Your English-speaking friend wants to learn basic words in your language.
ai_opening: I've always wanted to learn some words in your language! Can you teach me how to say hello, thank you, and maybe order food? I promise I'll try my best!
learning_goal: Practice explaining and teaching using simple English
rescue_hint: You could say: In my language, we say... It means... Try to say...

title: Dealing with Jet Lag
emotional_stakes: You just arrived after a long flight and can barely keep your eyes open at noon.
ai_opening: You look exhausted! Long flight? I remember my first time crossing time zones - it took me a week to feel normal again. How are you coping with the jet lag?
learning_goal: Practice describing physical states and discussing coping strategies
rescue_hint: You could say: I feel so... I can't seem to... Do you have any tips for...?

title: Smart Home Setup
emotional_stakes: You just bought smart home devices and need help setting them up.
ai_opening: Welcome to SmartHome support! I see you purchased our starter kit. Have you connected the hub to your Wi-Fi yet? Let's walk through the setup step by step.
learning_goal: Practice following technical instructions and troubleshooting
rescue_hint: You could say: I'm stuck on... It says... What should I do next?

title: Retirement Planning Chat
emotional_stakes: You're meeting with a financial advisor to plan for your future.
ai_opening: Thank you for coming in. Let's discuss your retirement goals. Have you given thought to when you'd like to retire, and what lifestyle you envision? We should also review your current investment portfolio.
learning_goal: Practice discussing complex financial topics with precision
rescue_hint: You could say: I'd like to retire by... My current savings are...

title: Garage Sale
emotional_stakes: You're at a neighborhood garage sale and see some things you like.
ai_opening: Hey, take a look around! Everything must go! That lamp you're looking at is only five dollars. See anything you like?
learning_goal: Practice negotiating prices and describing objects
rescue_hint: You could say: How much for this...? Would you take...?

title: Escape Room Challenge
emotional_stakes: You're in an escape room with a friend and you have 30 minutes left!
ai_opening: Okay, we've solved two puzzles but there are still three more! Look, there's a code on this wall and a locked box over there. What do you think we should try next?
learning_goal: Practice making suggestions, problem-solving, and expressing urgency
rescue_hint: You could say: Let's try... What if we... Maybe this goes with...

title: Charity Fundraiser Speech
emotional_stakes: You're giving a speech at a charity gala to inspire donations.
ai_opening: Ladies and gentlemen, our next speaker has been working tirelessly with communities in need. Please welcome our guest. The stage is yours.
learning_goal: Practice delivering persuasive speeches and using emotive language
rescue_hint: You could say: Thank you. Tonight, I want to share a story that...

title: Lost and Found
emotional_stakes: You left your bag on the train and are at the lost and found office.
ai_opening: Hello, this is the lost and found office. Did you lose something? Can you describe it for me?
learning_goal: Practice describing objects and personal belongings in detail
rescue_hint: You could say: I lost my... It's a... with...

title: Science Fair Project
emotional_stakes: You're presenting your science project to judges at the school fair.
ai_opening: Interesting project! Can you walk me through your hypothesis and explain what your experiment showed? I'd love to understand your results.
learning_goal: Practice explaining processes and presenting findings clearly
rescue_hint: You could say: My project is about... I predicted that... The results showed...

title: Adopting a Pet
emotional_stakes: You're at an animal shelter ready to adopt your first pet.
ai_opening: Welcome! We have many wonderful animals looking for their forever homes. Are you looking for a cat or a dog? Do you live in a house or an apartment? That helps us match you with the right pet.
learning_goal: Practice asking detailed questions and discussing preferences and requirements
rescue_hint: You could say: I live in... I'm looking for a... that is...

title: First Day at University
emotional_stakes: It's your first day at a foreign university and you're trying to find your classroom.
ai_opening: Hey, you look a bit confused! Are you a new student too? I'm trying to find the lecture hall for Introduction to Psychology. Are you in that class?
learning_goal: Practice asking for help on campus and making new connections
rescue_hint: You could say: Yes, I'm new here! I'm looking for... Do you know where...?

title: Photography Walk
emotional_stakes: You joined a photography walking tour and the instructor is teaching techniques.
ai_opening: Look at that light coming through the trees! This is the perfect moment for a photo. What angle would you shoot this from? Have you tried adjusting your aperture?
learning_goal: Practice understanding technical instructions and describing visual scenes
rescue_hint: You could say: I think I would take the photo from... How do I adjust the...?

emotional_stakes: You're trying a guided meditation class to manage stress.
ai_opening: Welcome to our mindfulness session. Before we begin, I'd like to know - have you practiced meditation before? What brought you here today?
learning_goal: Practice describing inner states and discussing wellness practices
rescue_hint: You could say: I've been feeling... I want to learn how to...

ai_opening: Welcome to the World Food Festival! We have over 30 cuisines here today. Would you like to try something? This booth has amazing Japanese ramen. Have you ever tried it?
